en.name: [Deprecated] ABG Ammonia
en.longDescription: **Deprecated** — duplicate of the pre-existing "Ammonia in blood" concept set (Liver test). The arterial vs. plasma distinction is not clinically meaningful for ammonia, and all relevant LOINC codes (Plasma, Blood, Arterial blood) are already covered by the surviving concept set.

createdByDetails.affiliation: Univ Rennes, CHU Rennes, INSERM, LTSI-UMR 1099, Rennes, France
